# Montessori Life Skills

> AMI-aligned Montessori activities and guidance for families, teachers, and assistants supporting children's independence and learning at home.

Montessori Life Skills is a focus-oriented learning app built around authentic AMI Montessori practice. It guides adults through presenting Practical Life, Sensorial, Language, Math, Geography, Botany, Cultural, and Grace & Courtesy activities using real Montessori materials.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the app and featured Montessori activities.
- [Welcome](/welcome): Landing page introducing the approach and getting started.
- [About](/about): The mission, AMI alignment, and who the app is for.
- [Practical Life](/practical-life): Activities that build independence, coordination, and care of self and environment.
- [Preview: Pouring Water](/preview/pouring-water): Free sample activity showing the full 5-phase presentation format.
- [Plans](/plans): Subscription tiers and what's included.
- [Guarantee](/guarantee): Our satisfaction guarantee.
- [Install](/install): How to install the app on iOS and Android.
- [Help](/help): Guidance for families using the app.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of the app.
